items.title: INDIAN NAVY TO HOST FIRST EDITION OF COMMANDERS’ CONFERENCE - 2026 AT NEW DELHI
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence INDIAN NAVY TO HOST FIRST EDITION OF COMMANDERS’ CONFERENCE - 2026 AT NEW DELHI Posted On: 12 APR 2026 11:30AM by PIB Delhi First edition of Indian Navy’s biannual Commanders’ Conference 2026 is scheduled over a period of three days at Nausena Bhawan, New Delhi, from 14 Apr to 16 Apr 2026 . The Apex Level Conference offers a stage for comprehensive rev…
